CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE CYNTHIA MING-MEI LEE; Clerk RWoods/MOlopernes.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2016 Continued To Feb-09-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-05-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Cross Complainant Sandra Mullins' Motion To Compel Deposition And Deposition And Document Production Of Plaintiff And Cross-Defendant Dia Ann Goode
Off Calendar Oct-14-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows:
Defendant/Cross-Defendant Sandra Mia Mullins' Motion to Compel the Deposition of Plaintiff Dia Ann Goode is GRANTED. Plaintiffs/Cross-defendant Goode is ordered to appear for deposition at a time and place agreed upon by the parties within 14 days of notice of entry of order. The request for monetary sanctions is DENIED. Defendant shall prepare a proposed order and email the order to pcc@mannningllp.com. (302)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Deposition And Deposition And Document Production Of Plaintiff And Cross-Defendant Dia Ann Goode
Off Calendar Oct-06-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Dia Ann Goode, (916-316-2729), Plaintiff/Cross Defendant in pro per opposing party.
No appearance by Defendant.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: CROSS COMPLAINANT SANDRA MULLINS' Motion To Compel Deposition And Deposition And Document Production Of Plaintiff And Cross-Defendant Dia Ann Goode is TRANSFERRED to Department 301 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. on October 14, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of reply to department 301 no later than October 6, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date and department. Opposing party is ordered to Comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 301 no later than Octobers 6, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2015 Set For Trial On Nov-09-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
